HGSS.391.0000:
Moomoo is sick...\r
She needs lots of Oran Berries.\f
HGSS.391.0001:
Thank you!
Moomoo is totally healthy again!\f
I’ll give you these Seals for
your trouble.\f
HGSS.391.0002:
Shocking!
I really want to give you some\r
Seals, but you don’t have a\r
Seal Case...\f
But don’t you worry.
My sister can give you a Seal Case!\f
HGSS.391.0003:
Ha!
Your Seal Case is full!\f
HGSS.391.0005:
Moomoo is sick...\r
She needs lots of Oran Berries.\f
HGSS.391.0006:
Thank you!
Moomoo is totally healthy again!\f
I’ll give you this Seal Case for
your trouble.\f
HGSS.391.0007:
You can customize your Poké Balls.\f
Select “BALL CAPSULES” from
your PC, and stick your Seals any way\r
you like on a Capsule, then put the\r
Capsule on any of your Poké Balls.\f
Try different things, and you’ll see.
My sister can give you Seals!\f
HGSS.391.0008:
We sell Moomoo Milk at home.\r
Don’t forget to drop by!\f
